info.name: Returns the Attributes for a Device

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: deviceId
params.description: ID associated with the device

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the results by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

items.docs: Returns the Attributes for a Device

params.description: ID associated with the device

params.description: Start of range for payload count query (ms since epoch)

params.description: End of range for payload count query (ms since epoch)

params.description: Resolution in milliseconds

info.name: Removes All Device Data for the Specified Time Range. Defaults to All Data.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: deviceId
params.description: ID associated with the device

params.name: start
params.description: Start time of export (ms since epoch - 0 means now, negative is relative to now)

params.name: end
params.description: End time of export (ms since epoch - 0 means now, negative is relative to now)

items.docs: Removes All Device Data for the Specified Time Range. Defaults to All Data.

info.name: Retrieve the Composite Last Complete State of the Matching Devices

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: start
params.description: Start of time range to look at to build composite state

params.name: end
params.description: End of time range to look at to build composite state

params.name: attributes
params.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to include. When not provided, returns all attributes.

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: page
params.description: Which page of results to return

params.name: perPage
params.description: How many items to return per page

params.name: query
params.description: Device advanced query JSON object

items.docs: Retrieve the Composite Last Complete State of the Matching Devices
